playerContract.fantasy: Tune a suspended cathedral mobile until three weighted bowls sing in exact balance.

requiredProof: targeted behavior and real-engine composition checks
zero console messages and bounded runtime metrics

repeated projection performs same-id replacement rather than duplicate creation
returned values are JSON serializable and cloned away from endpoint storage
the command does not tick either domain or decide settled eligibility

specialization: authored bowl spatial and weight matching
adapterOnly: settled body position translated into a weighted trigger source

settled eligibility, invocation timing, tick scheduling, or application outcomes
browser, renderer, camera, audio, VFX, DOM, diagnostics, telemetry, or authored tuning

new behavior has no kit manifest or atlas/status mapping

authoritative id, position, and mass override caller attempts

command adds no tick or frame advancement
runtime kit owns zero resources, events, and systems
